landing.eyebrow: Built for international students learning in Australia
landing.title: Learn from any lecture — in the language you think in.
landing.subtitle: Bilingual subtitles and AI study tools for Echo360, Coursera, Udemy, and YouTube. Built for international students in Australia who deserve to understand every lecture the first time it's said.
landing.problem: International students in Australian lecture halls — and skilled migrants chasing certs after work — pay full price to learn in a second language. You shouldn't have to decode English before you can even start learning the content.
landing.trustLine: Free during the hackathon · No credit card · Works in Chrome
landing.linkVideoTitle: How to link the extension to your account
landing.differentiatorsTitle: Why our subtitles aren't like the others
landing.differentiatorsSubtitle: You've tried auto-captions and Google Translate in a side tab. Here's why BridgeAI actually holds up in a real lecture.

differentiators.title: Both languages, side-by-side
differentiators.desc: Most tools replace English with a translation. We show both lines together — so you learn the English term while you understand the meaning.

differentiators.title: Whole sentences, lecture context
differentiators.desc: Auto-captions translate word-by-word and butcher jargon. We use Claude Sonnet on full sentences — so "recurrence relation" reads the way your tutor would say it.

differentiators.title: Translate once, study many times
differentiators.desc: Your summary, quiz, vocab pool, and chatbot all read from the same translation. No contradictions across tools.

differentiators.title: Works inside Echo360, Coursera, Udemy
differentiators.desc: Browser translation breaks on protected players. The extension captures captions from inside the player itself.

landing.howItWorksIntro: Two paths in. Same study tools at the end. Pick the one that matches your lecture source.
landing.tracksTitle: Two ways to bring a lecture in

youtubeTrack.title: Paste a link. That's it.
youtubeTrack.subtitle: Public YouTube lectures work end-to-end on the website — no install needed.

steps.title: Open your home page
steps.desc: Sign in and go to your dashboard. Click "Add lecture" to open the form.

steps.title: Paste the YouTube URL & pick a language
steps.desc: Drop in any youtube.com or youtu.be link. Choose Thai, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Vietnamese, Indonesian, Spanish, and more.

steps.title: Wait while we translate
steps.desc: We pull the transcript, translate it line-by-line, and build your study materials. Longer videos take longer — feel free to grab coffee.

extensionTrack.title: Install the extension once. Capture any lecture after.
extensionTrack.subtitle: These platforms sit behind logins or DRM, so we capture the transcript right inside your browser via the BridgeAI Chrome extension.

steps.title: Download the Chrome extension
steps.desc: Use the "Download extension" button at the top of this page. Unzip it, then in Chrome go to chrome://extensions, turn on Developer Mode, and click "Load unpacked".

steps.title: Sign in & link the extension to your account
steps.desc: Create your BridgeAI account first, then open the Link Extension page. One click connects the extension so saved lectures land in your dashboard.

steps.title: Open a lecture & turn on the transcript
steps.desc: Go to your Echo360, Coursera, or Udemy course. Turn on the platform's built-in transcript or captions panel — the extension reads from it.

steps.title: Choose your language & click Translate
steps.desc: Open the BridgeAI extension popup, pick your study language, and hit Translate. Generation time scales with video length — a 60-minute lecture takes longer than a 10-minute one.

steps.title: Save to dashboard, then head back home
steps.desc: Want the summary, quiz, vocabulary list, and chatbot kept for later? Click "Save to dashboard" in the extension, then return to your home page — the lecture is waiting in your library.

landing.dashboardTitle: What you unlock on your dashboard
landing.dashboardSubtitle: Every saved lecture gets the same toolkit, in the language you chose.

dashboardFeatures.title: Bilingual summary
dashboardFeatures.desc: A clear, structured recap of the lecture written in your language — perfect for review before an exam.

dashboardFeatures.title: Auto-generated quiz
dashboardFeatures.desc: Multiple-choice questions pulled straight from the lecture so you can check what actually stuck.

dashboardFeatures.title: Vocabulary pool
dashboardFeatures.desc: Key terms and jargon from the lecture, defined in your language, ready to drill.

dashboardFeatures.title: Lecture chatbot
dashboardFeatures.desc: Ask anything about the lecture in your language. Answers come back with timestamp citations so you can jump straight to the moment in the video.

landing.closingTitle: English shouldn't decide whether you pass.
landing.closingBody: International student, skilled migrant, late-night cert chaser — wherever you're learning in Australia, BridgeAI keeps the subtitles honest and gets out of the way.
landing.footerRight: A student project for the WSTI Hackathon, 2026.

home.subtitle: Pick up where you left off, or add a new lecture.
home.emptySubtitle: Add your first lecture to get started.

addPanel.title: Add a new lecture
addPanel.description: Paste a YouTube URL and pick your language.
addPanel.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid YouTube URL.
